headline: Teradyne (TER) Wins Injunction in Robotics Copyright Case
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the 10 Best Fast Growth Stocks to Invest In Now. In February, Teradyne Robotics A/S, a subsidiary of Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER), filed a copyright infringement case in Germany against Elite Robots Deutschland GmbH, alleging unauthorized use of Universal Robots’ software. On April 20, 2026, the Regional Court of Hamburg […]

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading higher amid sympathy with Intel, which reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and issued Q2 guidance above estimates. Also, reports suggest that a strike action at a Samsung Electronics facility earlier this month led to lower production, which may boost sales for competitors.
summary: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading higher amid sympathy with Intel, which reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and issued Q2 guidance above estimates. Also, reports suggest that a strike action at a Samsung Electronics facility earlier this month led to lower production, which may boost sales for competitors.
